questionHtml: The same apparatus was used in another experiment, but the potted plant was exposed to light. Predict with a reason the results for lime water in flask C after one hour.
markschemeHtml:
no change/limewater stays clear
OR
because plant takes in carbon dioxide by photosynthesis;

Do not accept references to oxygen produced by photosynthesis

meta.title: The same apparatus was used in another experiment, but the potted plant was exposed to light. Predict with a reason the results for lime water in flask C after one hour.
breadcrumbLabels: C1.1.8. Effects of temperature, pH and substrate concentration on the rate of enzyme activity
